name: sika-sentinel-default
description: Default Sika Sentinel policy catalogue — mirrors the original hardcoded 7-rule set. Behaviour-preserving migration of the pre-catalogue engine.

rules.name: RECIPIENT_PRESENT
rules.description: Transfer actions must name a non-blank recipient account.

rules.name: AMOUNT_VALID
rules.description: Transfer amount must be strictly greater than zero.

rules.name: ACTOR_AUTHORISED
rules.description: Actor role must be one of the permitted roles for any action.

rules.name: TREASURY_NOT_FROZEN
rules.description: Transfers are blocked when the treasury posture is FROZEN.

rules.name: RECIPIENT_APPROVED
rules.description: Recipient must be on the actor's approved allowlist when enforcement is enabled.

rules.name: AMOUNT_WITHIN_LIMIT
rules.description: Transfers above the actor's per-action threshold require a secondary approval.

rules.name: TREASURY_NOT_RESTRICTED
rules.description: Transfers are routed to manual review when the treasury posture is RESTRICTED.
